# 🧠 HumanOrAI — Can You Tell the Difference?

> A real-time social deduction game built by **Akdeniz University** Medicine students.

**🔗 Live Demo:** [https://akdeniz-humanorai.onrender.com/auth](https://akdeniz-humanorai.onrender.com/auth)

---

## 🎮 What Is This?

**HumanOrAI** is an interactive, multiplayer deduction game where players submit questions and must decide whether the answer was written by a **real Human Doctor** or generated by an **AI assistant**.

Doctors try to write answers that fool players into thinking they are AI.  
Players try to correctly identify the source of each answer.

It's a game of psychology, strategy, and a little bit of paranoia.

---

## 🚀 How to Play

### As a **Player (Seeker)**
1. Join or create a **Group**
2. Type any question in the terminal
3. A Doctor or AI will answer your question
4. **Guess** whether the answer came from a Human or an AI
5. Earn points for correct guesses — lose them for wrong ones

### As a **Doctor (Deceiver)**
1. Log in with your Doctor key
2. Join a Group
3. Accept incoming questions from the queue
4. Write answers that convince players you are an AI
5. Earn points every time you successfully fool someone

---

## ✨ Features

| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| 🏠 **Persistent Groups** | Create named groups with invite codes. Groups persist across sessions. |
| 📊 **Live Scoreboard** | Unified leaderboard sorted by accuracy (seekers) and deception rate (doctors) |
| 🌐 **EN / TR Language Support** | Full bilingual interface — switch languages anytime |
| ⚡ **Real-time Gameplay** | Socket.IO powered live updates — no page refresh needed |
| 🤖 **Dual AI Failover** | Two Gemini API accounts with automatic failover for high availability |
| 📈 **Granular Stats** | Track "Tricked by AI", "Tricked by Human", "Fooled", "Exposed" separately |
| 🔐 **Role-Based Access** | Separate Guest, Doctor, and Admin roles with protected routes |

---

## 🛠 Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| **Frontend** | React, Vite, TailwindCSS, Socket.IO Client |
| **Backend** | Node.js, Express 5, Socket.IO |
| **Database** | PostgreSQL (Neon) in production, SQLite in development |
| **ORM** | Sequelize |
| **AI** | Google Gemini API (dual-account failover) |
| **Deployment** | Render (unified monolith) |
| **Auth** | JWT tokens, session-based guest login |

---

## 🏗 Architecture

```
Akdeniz_HumanOrAI/
├── backend/
│   ├── controllers/       # Auth, game, admin logic
│   ├── models/            # Sequelize models (User, Group, GroupMember, Question, Answer, Guess)
│   ├── routes/            # Express route definitions
│   ├── middleware/        # JWT auth middleware
│   ├── services/          # AI service (Gemini dual-account)
│   └── index.js           # Entry point, serves frontend static files
└── frontend/
    ├── src/
    │   ├── pages/         # Auth, Group, AskQuestion, DoctorPanel, Scoreboard, About
    │   ├── components/    # Navbar
    │   ├── contexts/      # LanguageContext (i18n)
    │   ├── locales/       # en.json, tr.json
    │   └── services/      # API client, Socket.IO
    └── dist/              # Built frontend (served by backend)
```

---

## 🧑‍💻 Local Development

### Prerequisites
- Node.js 18+
- npm

### Setup

```bash
# Clone the repo
git clone https://github.com/UnExpectedd0/Akdeniz_HumanOrAI.git
cd Akdeniz_HumanOrAI
```

```bash
# Install backend dependencies
cd backend
npm install
```

```bash
# Install frontend dependencies
cd ../frontend
npm install
```

### Environment Variables

Create `backend/.env`:

```env
PORT=5000
JWT_SECRET=your_jwt_secret
DOCTOR_SECRET=your_doctor_secret
GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_key
GEMINI_API_KEY_2=your_second_gemini_key
ALLOWED_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173

# Admin
ADMIN_USERNAME=your_admin_username
ADMIN_PASSWORD=your_admin_password
```

#Simply click and run the **`Run-Project.bat`** file in the root directory. This will automatically build the frontend and start the backend server.

App runs at **http://localhost:5000**

---

## 📦 Deployment

This project is deployed as a **unified monolith** on [Render](https://render.com):

- The backend serves the built frontend from `frontend/dist/`
- Database: **Neon PostgreSQL** (production) / SQLite (local dev)
- Schema auto-migrates on deploy via `sequelize.sync({ alter: true })`
